   |                     ^^^^^^^^^
hint: Use documented named, unaliased imports from "sloppy", "sloppy/time", "sloppy/fs", "sloppy/crypto", "sloppy/codec", "sloppy/net", "sloppy/os", or "sloppy/workers"; Sloppy does not implement Node or npm resolution.
